9
10#include "Sparc.h"
11#include "llvm/IR/Module.h"
12#include "llvm/Support/TargetRegistry.h"
13using namespace llvm;
14
15Target llvm::TheSparcTarget;
16Target llvm::TheSparcV9Target;
17
18extern "C" void LLVMInitializeSparcTargetInfo() {
19 RegisterTarget<Triple::sparc, /*HasJIT=*/ true>
20 X(TheSparcTarget, "sparc", "Sparc");
21 RegisterTarget<Triple::sparcv9, /*HasJIT=*/ true>
22 Y(TheSparcV9Target, "sparcv9", "Sparc V9");
23}
Y
static RegisterPass< Hello2 > Y("hello2", "Hello World Pass (with getAnalysisUsage implemented)")
